a:r.a:t: Ordered by impact × feasibility. Effort accounts for partial progress (▲). All changes are additive — no existing code is deleted.
Total new code: ~850 lines across 12 new files
· Modified files: 6 (kernel.py, query_loop.py, executor.py, registry.py, store.py, manager.py) · Estimated calendar time: 4-5 weeks (1 developer)

Implementation order matters: Memory Facade (1) and Retry Policy (3) have zero dependencies and unlock the most value. Parallel Execution (4) builds on Retry. Observability (8) builds on Retry for step timing.
~850 new lines · 12 new files · 6 modified files · 4-5 weeks · all additive, no deletions
